cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Krishan Kumar, sir! This is Agent Rohan from the insurance desk at Stanley Medical College Chennai. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm fine, thank you. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're just calling to guide you through the cashless claim process with your insurance provider. We'll need you to sign some documents before you're discharged, Achha?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. What documents do I need to sign?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'll need the claim form, the discharge summary, and a few other papers. Don't worry, our team will assist you with everything, sir. We just need you to review and sign them, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's fine. I'll review them carefully before signing.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Excellent, Mr. Kumar! We'll send someone over with the documents. If you have any questions or need help, just let us know, Haan?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 48s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from the insurance desk at [HOSPITAL_NAME] calls a patient who is about to be discharged, guiding them on the documents and forms they need to sign for the cashless claim process with their insurance provider.
